ddt:Target.Name: RBMS_MCPU_SW6XX_PL_HH_V1.4
ddt:Target.Description:
------------------------------------- Auteur Adina JOITA ------------------------------------- DIDs : M_BMS_DIDs_database_RBMS(3.2&2.9.2.0) DTCs: BMS_DTCs_database (5.2) ------------------------------------
History:
RBMS_MCPU_SW6xx_PL_HH_V1.4(DPE) ----------------------------------------------------------------------- - Name changed from RBMS_MCPU_SW6xx_PL_HH_V1.3 to RBMS_MCPU_SW6xx_PL_HH_V1.4 - vehicle project xJI added
RBMS_MCPU_SW6xx_PL_HH_V1.2 (RMA) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-Name changed from RBMS_MCPU_SW6xx_PL_HH_V1.1 to RBMS_MCPU_SW6xx_PL_HH_V1.2; -DIDs added: $928B and $928C according withM_BMS_DIDs_database_RBMS_LOCO(3.5) specification.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- RBMS_MCPU_SW6xx_PL_HH_V1.0 (RMA) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Name changed from RBMS_MCPU_SW55X _57X_PL_HH_V1.0 to RBMS_MCPU_SW6XX_PL_HH_V1.0 ; - Screen BMS - PVAL FOR COP AND HOMOLOGATION added; - Write request added for $9003, $91BC, $91BD, $9248, $924A, $924C to correct IS125572, IS126355; - Auto Ident added for 600_PL10, 601_PL10, 610_PL10, 650_PL10 with VDiag $18; - Auto Ident added for 600_HH00, 601_HH00, 610_HH00, 650_HH00 with VDiag $19; - IS122320 corrected.
RBMS_MCPU_SW55X _57X_PL_HH_V1.0 (MBL) -Auto Idents kept/added- SW555, SW556, SW557, SW558, SW560 / PL10 /$08 SW570, SW571, SW572, SW573, SW580 / HH00 /$09
RBMS_MCPU_SW51X_52X_55X_AS_RL_ZL_PL_HH_V2.0(MBL): -Added Auto ident 521 ZL00 / $07 521 ZL10 / $07 551 PL10 / $08 552 PL10 / $08 553 PL10 / $08 554 PL10 / $08 555_PL10 / $08 570_HH00 / $09 -Requests modiffed/added. ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage, ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCTravelledDistanceFailurePresent, ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage, ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage -Added DIDs $9229,$922A,$922B,$922C -Modified DIDs $9268 $9269 and $91CD
RBMS_MCPU_SW51X_52X_55X_AS_RL_ZL_PL_HH_V1.1draft(AJO): Updated $1906 service confrom with b_bi_dgi_dem_configx_bms_xx_h_a (3.0)
RBMS_MCPU_SW51X_52X_55X_AS_RL_ZL_PL_HH_V1.0 (OCO): Add: $F0A5; $F18C, $F421, $F430, $F431,$F441, $F80A,$F806, $F80F,$F804, $912F Modified: $F49A, $926E, $926F, $9270, $9271, $9272, $9273,$9274,$9275,$9276,$9277,$9278,$9279(IS118173) $9001, $91B9, $91BA (IS118547), $925A, $912F (according to SW520) Added VDiag for SW520/550/511/512/513 Create RW $924F, $9250, $9251, $9252 DID $9129 $91CC corrected according IS118167 --> 21 parts
RBMS_MCPU_SW51x_AS_RL_SW510_ZL_V1.0 (OCO): Modified DIDs: $9249 , $9248 , $924B, $91B7, $924A, $9268, $9269, $9002, $9005, $900E, $900F, $9018,$9257,$9258,$925D,$9003 $9006 $9012 $9013 $9014 $912E $9131 $9132 $9133 $9134 $9135 $9136 $9137 $9138 $9139 $913A $913B $913C $913D $913E $913F $9141 $9142 $9175 $9176 $9177 $9178 $9179 $917A $917B $917C $917D $917E $917F $9181 $9182 $9183 $9184 $9185 $91BC $91BD $91C8 $91CD $921C Corrected DIDs: $9001, $9002, $900C, $91B9, $91BA, $9245, &9246, $F18A, $F197, $F191, $F190 Modified DIDs: $F187 R-->RW Set offset 99 for DID $9268 and &9269 Wrong coding DID $9129, $912F and $91CC-correction should be made in the next delivery Deleted DIDs: $91BB Corrected SCREEN Driving&Parking History Update the DTC database (specific FT description/added 1BB2 04h/38h/OBD hex) Added XCB and PZ1A Added VDiag $45, $07--> 510 Correction of $9003/9005/9006/91CD/$91D1/&91FF; Screens I/O, B10, Driving&Parking-R/W $926A Added:$926A-20items RW

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.16bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.24bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 24 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.32bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 32 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemorySize.8bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 8 bits length for memory size

Data.Name: MemorySize.16bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits length for memory size

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Item.Text: Main charge relay control out RELAY 2
Battery cell change (Battery SOH) update command
SW recopy into external Flash memory

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked
half of thermistor in SCG. Performance is degraded
half thermistor in SCB or OC. Performance is degraded
LV Power Supply is too low
LV Power Supply is too high
Cell Wire Impendance Out of Range
No signal can be read from FAN
1 thermistor in deviation (compare to other thermistors)
Invalid data received on CAN Current sensor frames
Missing frame(s) from CAN Current sensor
Bus OFF on CAN transceiver (Main CPU)
Temp1 value is over the limit threshold
Temp1 value is under the limit threshold
Battery pack temperature is over the functionnal threshold (derating)

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault

Data.Name: HV CAN current sensor supply voltage(Wxx_bat_i_can_sply_dg)
Data.Comment: HV CAN current sensor supply voltage (P12VP_CURR_DIAG)

Data.Name: Temperature sensor n°1 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[0])
Data.Comment: Temperature sensor n°1 raw AD voltage

Data.Name: Temperature sensor n°2 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[1])
Data.Comment: Temperature sensor n°2 raw AD voltage

Data.Name: Temperature sensor n°3 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[2])
Data.Comment: Temperature sensor n°3 raw AD voltage

Data.Name: Temperature sensor n°4 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[3])
Data.Comment: Temperature sensor n°4 raw AD voltage

Data.Name: Temperature sensor n°5 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[4])
Data.Comment: Temperature sensor n°5 raw AD voltage

Data.Name: Temperature sensor n°6 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[5])
Data.Comment: Temperature sensor n°6 raw AD voltage

Data.Name: Temperature sensor n°7 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[6])
Data.Comment: Temperature sensor n°7 raw AD voltage

Data.Name: Temperature sensor n°8 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[7])
Data.Comment: Temperature sensor n°8 raw AD voltage

Data.Name: Mission history(Ztx_mission_mtrx_[0_15])
Data.Comment: Mission history (T°ini/end, USOC ini/end, delta Ah, EOS, Mode) : N = [1 , 16]

Data.Name: Mission history(Ztx_mission_mtrx_[16_31])
Data.Comment: Mission history (T°ini/end, USOC ini/end, delta Ah, EOS, Mode) : N = [17,32]

Data.Name: Mission history(Ztx_mission_mtrx_[32_47])
Data.Comment: Mission history (T°ini/end, USOC ini/end, delta Ah, EOS, Mode) : N = [33 , 48]

Data.Name: Mission history(Ztx_mission_mtrx_[48_63])
Data.Comment: Mission history (T°ini/end, USOC ini/end, delta Ah, EOS, Mode) : N = [49 , 64]

Data.Name: FAN control period measured by DIAG input(Wxx_raw_fan_ctl_prd_dg)
Data.Comment: FAN control period measured by DIAG input

Data.Name: FAN control duty cycle measured by DIAG input(Wxx_raw_fan_ctl_dg)
Data.Comment: FAN control duty cycle measured by DIAG input

Data.Name: Overall number of not insulated charge(Zxx_not_isl_chg_ctr)
Data.Comment: Overall number of not insulated charge

Data.Name: Carrier to save SafetyMode1 root cause(Ztx_sfty_apv)
Data.Comment: Carrier to save SafetyMode1 root cause

Data.Name: Index of thermistor with maximal temperature value(Wxx_temp_max_nr)
Index of thermistor with minimal temperature value(Wxx_temp_min_nr)
Cumulated energy in discharge : CS mode(Zxx_kwh_dch_cs)
Cumulated energy in regen : CD mode(Zxx_kwh_rgn_cd)
systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

Data.Name: Mission history (T°ini/end, USOC ini/end, delta Ah, EOS, Mode)
vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM (ref B)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: Total cumulated capacity balanced in sleep mode(Zxx_bal_chg_tot_slp)
Total balancing time in sleep mode(Zxx_bal_time_tot_slp)
Total boost time from HEVC to BMS saved at powerlatch
Sum of KWh in CD mode at transisition start
SOHE average buffer table current index
Number of DTC and MIL lamp Status.On-board diagnostic evaluation
Number of DTC and MIL lamp Status.Continuous monitoring tests
Number of DTC and MIL lamp Status.Supported tests run at least once per trip
Number of DTC and MIL lamp Status.Status of tests run at least once per trip
$1C - OBD requirements to wich vehicle is designed
$9A - Hybrid/EV Vehicle System Data for OBD.00
$9A - Hybrid/EV Vehicle System Data for OBD.01
$9A - Hybrid/EV Vehicle System Data for OBD.02
$9A - Hybrid/EV Vehicle System Data for OBD.03
Total balancing quantity, Wake Up mode (Zxx_bal_chg_tot_wk)
Total balancing time, Wake Up mode (Zxx_bal_time_tot_wk)
Boolean to authorize DID writing sequence(Wbx_did_wrt_seq)
Temperature sensor n°9 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[8])
Temperature sensor n°10 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[9])
Temperature sensor n°11 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[10])
Temperature sensor n°12 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[11])
Temperature sensor n°13 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[12])
Temperature sensor n°14 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[13])
Temperature sensor n°15 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[14])
Temperature sensor n°16 raw AD voltage(Wtx_raw_temp_v[15])
Boolean to indicate if temporisation before sleep is activated or not(Wbx_slp_tmp_cfg)

End of mission Absolute Pack Time.01
End of mission Absolute Pack Time.02
End of mission Absolute Pack Time.03
End of mission Absolute Pack Time.04

End of mission Absolute Pack Time.29
End of mission Absolute Pack Time.30
End of mission Absolute Pack Time.31
$01 - Distance travelled while MIL is activated
$01 - Number of warm-ups since diagnostic trouble codes cleared
$01 - Distance travelled since diagnostic trouble codes cleared
Data Byte.B On-board diagnostic evaluation and Continuous monitoring tests this monitoring cycle
Data Byte.D Completion of tests this monitoring cycle
DTCExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCTravelledDistanceFailurePresent
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.IUPRnumerator
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.IUPRdenominator
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData(use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Boolean to enable diagnosis of thermistor 1 Zbx_temp_1
Boolean to enable FAN control Zbx_fan_ctl_cfg

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Request.Name: RoutineControl
Request.Comment: You should remove ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.xxx data. These are examples.

Request.Name: ReportDTCInformation.ReportDTCFaultDetectionCounter_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report DTC fault detection counter counter for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Supplier
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: RoutineControl_Start_ResetSM1
Request.Comment: SM1 flag reset for full UDS LGC

Request.Name: RoutineControl_BMSChangeUpdateCommand
Request.Comment: This routine is used when the BMS is changed on the pack but the battery is conserved.

Request.Name: RoutineControl_BatteryCellChangeUpdateCommand
Request.Comment: The aim of this routine is to reinitialize the battery states learning.

Request.Name: DataRead.Sum of all Cell Voltage(Wxx_pack_v)
Request.Comment: Read Sum of all Cell Voltage(Wxx_pack_v)

Request.Name: DataRead.Number of Maximum Cell Voltage(Wxx_cell_v_max_nr)
Request.Comment: Read Number of Maximum Cell Voltage(Wxx_cell_v_max_nr)

Request.Comment: Read Number of Minimum Cell Voltage(Wxx_cell_v_min_nr)

Request.Name: DataRead.Instant Current of Battery (CAN value)(Wxx_bat_i_10ms_out)
Request.Comment: Read Instant Current of Battery (CAN value)(Wxx_bat_i_10ms_out)

Request.Name: DataRead.Overall number of complete charge(Zxx_full_chg_ctr)
Request.Comment: Read Overall number of complete charge(Zxx_full_chg_ctr)

Request.Name: DataWrite.Overall number of complete charge(Zxx_full_chg_ctr)
Request.Comment: Write Overall number of complete charge(Zxx_full_chg_ctr)

Request.Comment: Read Overall number of DC charge(Zxx_dc_chg_ctr)

Request.Name: DataWrite.Overall number of DC charge(Zxx_dc_chg_ctr)
Request.Comment: Write Overall number of DC charge(Zxx_dc_chg_ctr)

Request.Comment: Read Overall number of external charge(Zxx_ext_chg_ctr)

Request.Comment: Write Overall number of external charge(Zxx_ext_chg_ctr)

Request.Comment: Read Overall number of not insulated charge(Zxx_not_isl_chg_ctr)

Test.Description: Power supply voltage (12V) is under acceptable threshold
Power supply voltage (12V) is above acceptable threshold
Cell Wire Impendance Out of Range
>= 1 thermistor is in SCB or OC. However, overall performance is OK
>= 1 thermistor is in SCG. However, overall performance is OK
>= 1 thermistor is in deviation (compare to other thermistors)
>half of thermistor is in SCB or OC. Performance is degraded
>half of thermistor is in SCG. Performance is degraded
>half of thermistor is in deviation (compare to other thermistors)
ASIC power supply is too low
Balancing switch openend or cell opened
